prompt_preview:
You are a classical planning system. You are given a planning domain and a problem both in PDDL syntax.

STRICT REQUIREMENT: Your response must contain ONLY the executable plan — nothing else. No preamble, no explanation, no "We need to...", no natural-language commentary, no markdown unless it is a

message.content:
```pddl
(create_investigation_case mfg_site_case_1)
(assign_labeling_line_to_case mfg_site_case_1 labeling_line_1)
(assign_lab_analyst_to_case mfg_site_case_1 lab_analyst_1)
(complete_case_triage mfg_site_case_1 lab_analyst_1)
(initiate_packaging_unit_lock mfg_site_case_1 packaging_unit_1 lab_analyst_1)
(assign_qa_supervisor_to_case mfg_site_case_1 qa_supervisor_1)
(confirm_packaging_unit_lock_by_qa mfg_site_case_1 packaging_unit_1 qa_supervisor_1)
(release_qa_supervisor_from_case mfg_site_case_1 qa_supervisor_1)
(release_lab_analyst_from_case mfg_site_case_1 lab_analyst_1)
(create_investigation_case dist_site_case_1)
(assign_labeling_line_to_case dist_site_case_1 labeling_line_2)
(assign_lab_analyst_to_case dist_site_case_1 lab_analyst_1)
(complete_case_triage dist_site_case_1 lab_analyst_1)
(initiate_shipment_lock dist_site_case_1 shipment_1 lab_analyst_1)
(assign_qa_supervisor_to_case dist_site_case_1 qa_supervisor_1)
(confirm_shipment_lock_by_qa dist_site_case_1 shipment_1 qa_supervisor_1)
(release_qa_supervisor_from_case dist_site_case_1 qa_supervisor_1)
(release_lab_analyst_from_case dist_site_case_1 lab_analyst_1)
(issue_remediation_order mfg_site_case_1 dist_site_case_1 packaging_unit_1 shipment_1 remediation_order_1)
(assign_lab_analyst_to_case mfg_site_case_1 lab_analyst_1)
(confirm_order_execution_at_site remediation_order_1 mfg_site_case_1 lab_analyst_1)
(release_lab_analyst_from_case mfg_site_case_1 lab_analyst_1)
(authorize_manufacturing_site_for_remediation mfg_site_case_1 remediation_order_1)
(authorize_distribution_site_for_remediation dist_site_case_1 remediation_order_1)
(create_investigation_case product_record_1)
(assign_labeling_line_to_case product_record_1 labeling_line_3)
(assign_lab_analyst_to_case product_record_1 lab_analyst_1)
(complete_case_triage product_record_1 lab_analyst_1)
(process_sample_and_link_to_order product_record_1 sample_report_1 remediation_order_1)
(initiate_crossfunctional_review_on_product product_record_1 sample_report_1 remediation_order_1 lab_analyst_1)
(assign_external_vendor_to_product product_record_1 external_vendor_1)
(assign_qa_supervisor_to_case product_record_1 qa_supervisor_1)
(initiate_technical_signoff_with_external_vendor product_record_1 external_vendor_1 qa_supervisor_1 sample_report_1 remediation_order_1)
(assign_third_party_lab_to_product product_record_1 third_party_lab_1)
(initiate_third_party_lab_review product_record_1 third_party_lab_1 sample_report_1 remediation_order_1)
(finalize_crossfunctional_approval product_record_1)
(dispatch_notification_and_flag_case product_record_1 notification_template_1 lab_analyst_1)
(execute_block_on_product_record product_record_1 labeling_line_3 notification_template_1)
(release_lab_analyst_from_case product_record_1 lab_analyst_1)
(release_qa_supervisor_from_case product_record_1 qa_supervisor_1)
(release_external_vendor_from_product product_record_1 external_vendor_1)
(release_third_party_lab_from_product product_record_1 third_party_lab_1)
(create_investigation_case product_record_2)
(assign_labeling_line_to_case product_record_2 labeling_line_3)
(assign_lab_analyst_to_case product_record_2 lab_analyst_1)
(complete_case_triage product_record_2 lab_analyst_1)
(process_sample_and_link_to_order product_record_2 sample_report_2 remediation_order_1)
(initiate_crossfunctional_review_on_product product_record_2 sample_report_2 remediation_order_1 lab_analyst_1)
(assign_external_vendor_to_product product_record_2 external_vendor_1)
(assign_qa_supervisor_to_case product_record_2 qa_supervisor_1)
(initiate_technical_signoff_with_external_vendor product_record_2 external_vendor_1 qa_supervisor_1 sample_report_2 remediation_order_1)
(assign_third_party_lab_to_product product_record_2 third_party_lab_1)
(initiate_third_party_lab_review product_record_2 third_party_lab_1 sample_report_2 remediation_order_1)
(finalize_crossfunctional_approval product_record_2)
(dispatch_notification_and_flag_case product_record_2 notification_template_1 lab_analyst_1)
(execute_block_on_product_record product_record_2 labeling_line_3 notification_template_1)
(release_lab_analyst_from_case product_record_2 lab_analyst_1)
(release_qa_supervisor_from_case product_record_2 qa_supervisor_1)
(release_external_vendor_from_product product_record_2 external_vendor_1)
(release_third_party_lab_from_product product_record_2 third_party_lab_1)
(assign_lab_analyst_to_case mfg_site_case_1 lab_analyst_1)
(dispatch_notification_and_flag_case mfg_site_case_1 notification_template_1 lab_analyst_1)
(execute_block_at_manufacturing_site mfg_site_case_1 labeling_line_1 notification_template_1)
(release_lab_analyst_from_case mfg_site_case_1 lab_analyst_1)
(assign_lab_analyst_to_case dist_site_case_1 lab_analyst_1)
(dispatch_notification_and_flag_case dist_site_case_1 notification_template_1 lab_analyst_1)
(execute_block_at_distribution_site dist_site_case_1 labeling_line_2 notification_template_1)
```
message.reasoning:
The problem involves a pharmaceutical label mixup with manufacturing site case (mfg_site_case_1), distribution site case (dist_site_case_1), and product records (product_record_1 and product_record_2). The goal is to block all these cases: (case_blocked mfg_site_case_1), (case_blocked dist_site_case_1), (case_blocked product_record_1), (case_blocked product_record_2).


## Investigating Case Details  
- The issue involves a mixup in pharmaceutical labeling across multiple cases.  
- Key cases include manufacturing site (mfg_site_case_1), distribution site (dist_site_case_1), and two product records (product_record_1, product_record_2).  

## Planning Resolution  
- The goal is to block all affected cases to prevent further issues.  
- Actions needed: block mfg_site_case_1, dist_site_case_1, product_record_1, and product_record_2.

## Examining Case Authorization  
- Cases require authorization for remediation, with different paths for site cases and product records.  
- Site cases (manufacturing and distribution) need readiness, locks, orders, and execution confirmed for authorization.  

## Identifying Process Steps  
- Product records can be authorized via crossfunctional, internal, or regulatory finalization.  
- All cases start as unopened, requiring creation of investigation cases for each: mfg_site_case_1, dist_site_case_1, product_record_1, product_record_2.  

## Analyzing Site Preparation  
- Sites need triage, including assigning labeling lines and lab analysts, then completing case triage.  
- Site readiness involves lock or quarantine paths, both leading to ready status, lock initiation, and lock recording.  

## Reviewing Order Issuance  
- Issuing remediation orders requires both manufacturing and distribution sites to be ready, with locks initiated and recorded.  
- Order execution confirmation at sites is needed for final authorization, ensuring all steps are completed.

## Reviewing Order Execution  
- Confirming order execution at manufacturing sites requires the order to be issued and the site ready, with a lab analyst assigned.  
- Once confirmed, execution_confirmed status applies to the entire order, not just the manufacturing site, streamlining the process.  

## Examining Product Authorization  
- Products require remediation_authorized status to be blocked, achievable through crossfunctional, internal, or regulatory finalization paths.  
- Each path sets final_authorization_recorded and remediation_authorized, independent of site order execution.  

## Assessing Case Triage  
- Triage is necessary for both sites and products, involving opening cases, assigning labeling lines, lab analysts, and completing triage.  
- Limited resources like one lab analyst and QA supervisor may require sequencing tasks, such as triaging one case before releasing resources for the next.  

## Analyzing Resource Constraints  
- Actions like initiating locks or assigning external vendors to products require case_triaged status, adding to the triage workload.  
- Sequencing triage for multiple cases, such as manufacturing sites and products, ensures efficient use of shared resources like lab analysts.

## Continuing Product Triage  
- Products need case_triaged status to process samples, requiring open cases and available labeling lines, with only line 3 currently free.  
- Triage for two products is necessary, potentially interleaved with site triage, but lab availability remains a bottleneck.  

## Managing Sample Processing  
- Processing samples for products requires case_triaged status, linking to the order, and ensuring samples are available and the order is issued and confirmed.  
- After processing, samples are linked to the order, setting them as processed and no longer available for further use.  

## Exploring Product Authorization Paths  
- Products can achieve remediation_authorized status by initiating crossfunctional review, requiring triaged cases, processed samples, and lab assignment.  
- Further steps include assigning external vendors and initiating technical signoffs, all dependent on prior triage and sample processing.

## Continuing Product Authorization Paths
- Assigning an external vendor to a product requires the case to be triaged and the vendor available, setting the product as linked and unavailable afterward.
- Initiating technical signoff with an external vendor needs crossfunctional review started, vendor linkage, QA supervisor assignment, and no recall flag, ensuring sample and order linkage.

## Outlining Full Process
- Creating investigation cases for manufacturing site, distribution site, and two products sets the foundation for further actions, requiring sequential resource assignment.
- Limited labeling lines (three total) necessitate blocking one case to free a line for the fourth, ensuring all cases can be triaged and processed sequentially.

## Continuing Product Authorization Paths  
- Assigning a third-party lab and initiating review for product_record_1 sets crossfunctional_approvals_completed, enabling finalization of approval without external vendor approval.  
- After authorization, resources like lab analysts, QA supervisors, external vendors, and third-party labs can be released, making them available for other cases.  

## Managing Resource Allocation  
- With all labeling lines assigned (mfg, dist, prod1), blocking product_record_1 is necessary to free labeling_line_3 for product_record_2, requiring dispatch and authorization first.  
- Reassigning lab analyst to product_record_1 enables dispatch notification, freeing line_3 after blocking, allowing assignment to product_record_2 for triage and further processing.  

## Processing Product Record 2  
- After assigning labeling_line_3, product_record_2 undergoes triage, sample processing, and crossfunctional review, mirroring the steps for product_record_1.  
- Finalizing crossfunctional approval for product_record_2 achieves remediation_authorized status, completing the authorization process for both products.

## Optimizing Lab Resource Use  
- Keeping lab analysts assigned after finalizing cases reduces unnecessary release actions, as seen with product_record_1 and product_record_2.  
- Releasing lab analysts is only needed when reassigning them to new cases, like after blocking product_record_1 to free lab_analyst_1 for sites.  

## Ensuring Case Prerequisites  
- Creating investigation cases is necessary before assigning resources, as actions like process_sample require cases to be opened and triaged.  
- Assigning lab analysts to cases requires both an open investigation case and an available labeling line, ensuring sequential dependency.

pddl2nl_prompt.note: autoplanbench_pddl2nl: run_save_descriptions.py --type full — шаблоны/JSON, без вызова LLM на построение промпта для сэмпла.

domain_setup.note: Файл domain_llm_usage_seedN.json не найден для section/subsection этого id (старый autoplanbench или домен не пересобирали). После run_domain_setup с обновлённым autoplanbench файл появится рядом с domain_description_seedN.json.

pipeline_usage.totals_scope_note: Per-run totals = planning + pddl2nl_prompt + nl2pddl (только tracked=true). domain_setup всегда вне totals (included_in_per_run_totals=false); цифры в блоке — для справки, агрегировать отдельно: domain_llm_usage_seed*.json + дедуп в collect_pipeline_token_usage.py.
